channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: German Chancellor Merz Advises Against His Children Moving to the U.S. Amid Social Concerns
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz recently expressed concerns about the current social and economic climate in the United States, telling an audience of young Catholics that he would not recommend his ...

item.title: Sue Ramirez shares thoughts on starting a family with Dominic Roque
item.description: In a recent interview, actress Sue Ramirez expressed her openness to starting a family with her longtime partner, Dominic Roque. The Filipino actress shared that while she and Dominic are focused on e...

item.title: David Masoko Explores Intimate and Ethical Street Photography
item.description: David Masoko’s series “Dislocated Presences” offers a fresh perspective on street photography by focusing on subtle gestures and transitional moments rather than traditional decisive scenes. Working i...

item.title: Federal politics shake-up: Albanese breaks promise, Taylor targets immigration, Hanson rises
item.description: This week in Australian federal politics has been marked by a series of contentious moves and policy announcements that could shape the nation’s future. Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has refused to ...

item.title: Education Ministry Warns Schools Against Unlawful Fee Increases
item.description: The Ministry of Education in Kenya has issued a stern warning to school heads against raising fees without following proper legal procedures. Education Cabinet Secretary Julius Ogamba spoke in Yatta, ...

item.title: Swatch closes multiple UK stores due to large crowds for limited edition Audemars Piguet collaboration watch
item.description: Swatch has temporarily closed several of its stores across the UK following significant crowds queuing for the launch of a new limited edition pocket watch created in collaboration with luxury watchma...

item.title: Federal government introduces measures to improve Canada’s export transportation infrastructure
item.description: Canada’s federal government is set to introduce new legislation and funding to strengthen the country’s export transportation systems, particularly in Saskatchewan. Minister of Transport Steven MacKin...

item.title: Nolubabalo Mcinga explains her political journey and commitment to UDM
item.description: Eastern Cape-born politician Nolubabalo Mcinga has addressed criticism over her multiple party affiliations after joining the United Democratic Movement (UDM). Previously an EFF MP, Mcinga left the pa...

item.title: Trump Administration Removes Hundreds of Diplomats During Ongoing Global Crises
item.description: The Trump administration has recently forced out hundreds of U.S. diplomats, raising concerns about the country’s capacity to respond to ongoing international crises. According to reports, nearly 250 ...

item.title: US Congressman Riley Moore Calls for Stronger Action from Trump Administration to Protect Christians in Nigeria's Middle Belt
item.description: A United States Congressman wey be Riley M. Moore don again call on President Donald Trump administration to take strong and forceful action to protect Christians wey dey for Nigeria. This one na base...

item.title: Car hits pedestrians in Modena, leaving eight injured, four critically
item.description: In Modena, northern Italy, a 31-year-old man drove a car onto a busy street sidewalk on Saturday, injuring eight people, four of them in critical condition. Authorities are investigating whether the i...

item.title: TTC and CUPE Local 2 extend contract talks past strike deadline to reach agreement on skilled maintenance workers
item.description: The Toronto Transit Commission (TTC) and CUPE Local 2 have agreed to extend contract negotiations beyond an initial midnight Friday strike deadline, with talks now continuing until 6 p.m. on Saturday....

item.title: Advanced smart lenses allow clear vision at all distances after cataract surgery in Tanzania
item.description: Dar es Salaam-based International Eye Hospital has started using advanced smart lenses for cataract patients, offering hope that they may no longer need glasses after surgery. Consultant ophthalmologi...

item.title: Netherlands Returns 1,000-Year-Old Chola Copper Plates to India During PM Modi's Visit
item.description: In a joyous cultural moment, Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced the repatriation of ancient Chola copper plates from the Netherlands to India. These 1,000-year-old artefacts, consisting of 21 larg...

item.title: Chelsea Agree Four-Year Deal to Appoint Xabi Alonso as New Manager
item.description: Chelsea Football Club don reportedly agree deal to appoint former Real Madrid and Bayer Leverkusen coach, Xabi Alonso, as their new manager. According to reports from The Athletic, Alonso don already ...

item.title: Trump's Visit to China Yields Minimal Progress on Strait of Hormuz Access
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump returned from a visit to China this week without achieving significant progress on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key global shipping route for oil. Iran has shown littl...

item.title: Tshisekedi seeks support from evangelical churches to counter Catholic opposition in DRC
item.description: In Democratic Republic of Congo, President Félix Tshisekedi is seeking political support from evangelical and revivalist churches as he considers a possible bid for a third term in office. This move c...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns prepare to overcome last season's CAF Champions League final loss against AS FAR
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns are determined to set right the painful defeat they suffered in last season's CAF Champions League final against Pyramids. According to defender Divine Lunga, the team has learnt fro...

item.title: Manchester City claim FA Cup with 1-0 victory over Chelsea thanks to Semenyo's goal
item.description: Manchester City secured the FA Cup title on Saturday by defeating Chelsea 1-0 in the final at Wembley. The decisive moment came in the 72nd minute when Ghanaian forward Antoine Semenyo produced a clev...

item.title: Tobi Amusan clocks season-best 12.41s to finish third at Diamond League Shanghai
item.description: Tobi Amusan, our Nigerian sprint hurdler and world record holder, started her 2026 athletics season strong with a third-place finish in the women’s 100m hurdles at the Diamond League meet in Shanghai,...
